summary: Plan-only classification for five open PR inventory items using the provided hydrated cluster preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations are recommended because merge preflight is incomplete for each PR: mergeability is unknown or required Codex /review proof is missing, with one PR also having a failing required proof/check signal. No security-sensitive items were detected.
